common.pom: Consistent language symbols and storytelling create a recognizable identity around abundance and progress The narrative is easy to adopt and share helping early community cohesion form
common.vision: Unite people around the idea of a Stellar World and shared progress

comud.pom: The system shows strong clarity and narrative coherence with solid infrastructure and visible activity Community and contribution layers are forming as awareness grows
comud.vision: Sustain an inspiring clear and growing platform for future builders

equilibrium.pom: Addresses a real demand for optimism and direction by offering a compelling framework for understanding and improving the world primarily through education and inspiration
equilibrium.vision: Fulfill the need for hopeful system level thinking in uncertain times

guide.pom: Guidance is driven by strong author vision structured messaging and calls to action The site presents coherent pathways through ideas collaboration and outreach even without formal governance systems
guide.vision: Offer clear inspirational direction for building a better future

success.pom: Signals include active website book presence social media and endorsements Early traction is visible through engagement pathways and expanding awareness though large scale metrics are not yet public
success.vision: Grow a cultural movement around the Stellar World vision

vow.pom: The platform centers a clear narrative through a book mission and glossary that frames global challenges with optimism It attracts readers builders and thinkers via content endorsements and social channels indicating growing cultural resonance
vow.vision: Inspire a bold shared vision of a thriving abundant future for humanity
